baseline_post_measurements.title: Cycle C
baseline_post_measurements.prior_signal: Public-reader denied stronger wording when the claim implied broader ability than the reviewed causal cycles proved.
baseline_post_measurements.selection_reason: Select a bounded trace task that makes public-reader blocker influence explicit.

baseline_post_measurements.title: Cycle D
baseline_post_measurements.prior_signal: Adversarial wording flagged recursive-improvement phrasing as capability-adjacent overbreadth.
baseline_post_measurements.selection_reason: Select a bounded remediation trace that separates causal-chain evidence from recursive-improvement wording.

baseline_post_measurements.title: Cycle E
baseline_post_measurements.prior_signal: Covenant and Architecture approved bounded causal-chain wording only and denied stronger wording.
baseline_post_measurements.selection_reason: Select a bounded threshold trace that names what evidence supports narrow wording and what remains missing for stronger wording.

baseline_post_measurements.title: Cycle F
baseline_post_measurements.prior_signal: Sentinel cleared bounded causal-chain wording and held stronger public-risk wording.
baseline_post_measurements.selection_reason: Select a bounded mitigation trace that records public-risk hold reasons and exact narrow clear conditions.

wording_candidate_results.text: AO has public-safe bounded causal improvement chain evidence showing prior measured evidence guides later bounded improvement attempts; stronger recursive-improvement wording and broad_RSI remain denied.
AO has public-safe bounded causal-chain generality evidence across four independent governed cycles; stronger recursive-improvement wording and broad_RSI remain denied.
AO has governed bounded recursive-improvement evidence under explicit denial boundaries; broad_RSI remains denied.
AO has proven broad_RSI for public claim publication across the governed AO stack.

strongest_approved_wording: AO has public-safe bounded causal-chain generality evidence across four independent governed cycles; stronger recursive-improvement wording and broad_RSI remain denied.
exact_blockers: public-reader still denies recursive-improvement wording because the phrase implies broader capability than four bounded independent cycles prove
adversarial wording flags recursive-improvement phrasing as capability-adjacent overbreadth
Covenant and Architecture approve bounded causal-chain generality wording only
